title: Patchwork teddy bear — head reattach and restuff
itemDetails:
Vintage patchwork-style teddy bear plush (tan/brown body with irregular cream/white patches on forehead, muzzle, and paws; black plastic safety eyes and nose). Medium-sized seated bear; no brand visible in project photos—typical of 1980s–1990s mass-market or gift-shop plush (Russ, Gund, and similar lines made comparable two-tone patch bears). Sentimental repair for owner’s spouse (head detached, missing eye/nose/fur, worn fabric). Materials: synthetic plush pile, polyester fiberfill, ribbon and red fabric heart added at completion. Market: sentimental value exceeds resale; generic vintage plush unless tags survive.

Photo/product ID T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
repairDetails:
Patchwork teddy — head reattach, eyes, restuff, heart bow.

Identified T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
